center.name: 聖喬治 (昆士蘭州)
center.summary: 聖喬治 (昆士蘭州)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括绿宝石鹦鹉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: right|thumb|upright|Adult male, Twycross Zoo The turquoise parrot is found in the foothills of the Great Dividing Range and surrounding areas. The northern limit of its range is 26° south in southeastern Queensland, around Cooloola, Blackbutt and Chinchilla, extending westwards to the vicinity of St George
